strengths: Quantified impact on acquisition and efficiency
weaknesses: Limited explicit DTC/growth marketing title history
Less than typical 4+ years in solely analytics roles
improvement_bullets: Conducted A/B testing on marketing email variants and landing page elements, leveraging SQL and Python to measure conversion lift and inform data-driven strategy for customer acquisition.
Engineered performance analysis frameworks using BigQuery and Snowflake to track channel-specific ROI, providing leadership with actionable insights for growth optimization.
Developed a data-driven strategy for campaign lifecycle management, utilizing Python to identify underperforming segments and shifting budget allocation to maximize customer lifetime value.
Integrated Snowflake and BigQuery data warehouses into existing ETL pipelines, facilitating advanced performance analysis of referral program metrics and user activation rates.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design A/B testing experiments, utilizing Tableau to visualize performance analysis and iterate on growth optimization tactics.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Growth Analytics Manager, Factor US opportunity with Factor_. I am interested in this opportunity because of Factor_'s commitment to data-driven growth and its innovative role in the meal-kit industry. What interests me about working for Factor_ is its focus on maximizing customer lifetime value through personalized nutrition, which aligns perfectly with my background in using data to solve complex operational and marketing challenges. I believe my expertise in advanced data analytics and my proven ability to drive cross-functional collaboration would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw data into actionable business intelligence. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and time series models that identified high-value customer segments. By integrating these insights into our marketing initiatives, I contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Growth Analytics Manager, Factor US role at Factor_ would allow me to bring my data storytelling skills to optimize referral and activation performance. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my growth optimization skills. I implemented automated workflows and rigorous reporting cycles that reduced process bottlenecks by 25% and improved team efficiency. By applying these same methodologies to Factor_'s referral programs, I am confident I can identify hidden value and drive sustainable growth. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my technical proficiency in SQL, Python, and cloud-based analytics in working on high-impact growth initiatives at Factor_. I know that my analytical rigor and strategic mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Growth Analytics Manager, Factor US role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
